name: Maas Group Holdings Limited
analysis: MGH's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$5.4100. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.5100, stop A$4.8213, target A$7.5761 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
